name: Bulk Decompress GCS Files
description: A pipeline which decompresses files on GCS to a specified location. Supported formats: Bzip2, deflate, and gzip.

parameters.name: inputFilePattern
parameters.label: The input file pattern to read from
parameters.helpText: The input file pattern to read from (e.g., gs://your-bucket/compressed/*.gz)

parameters.name: outputDirectory
parameters.label: The output location to write to
parameters.helpText: The output location to write to (e.g., gs://your-bucket/decompressed/).

parameters.name: errorDirectory
parameters.label: The error location to write to
parameters.helpText: The error location to write to file which were failed to decompress (e.g., gs://your-bucket/error/decompress/).
